cookbook_cmd: omitted from standalone kernel task; use bench/workloads.json and docs/captured_kernel_api_shapes.json for RLCR
shape_capture_note: Captured 2026-07-08 on Verda B300 light-face-hides-fin-03-1 from a real Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct-FP8 TP=8 EP=8 SGLang production-path execution in temporary container sglang-qwen3-coder on eight B300 GPUs. Used a model-local HF cache after snapshot download, tool_call_parser=qwen3_coder, disabled FlashInfer autotune, disabled CUDA graph prefill/decode, cleared startup health records before capture, and marked four request windows covering long prefill, short decode, mid concurrency, and high concurrency. The legacy qwen3_coder__fp8_bmm task is routed to the real low-level FlashInfer TRTLLM batch context/decode APIs observed in the production path, while the attention task uses the higher-level TRTLLM backend forward APIs.
